title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7-Lite
description: Ubiquiti U7-Lite is the most affordable WiFi 7 UniFi AP. It is a dual-band access point with a transmission speed of up to 4.3Gbps* in the 5GHz band and up to 688 Mbps in the 2.4GHz band, featuring advanced WPA3 encryption. The U7-Lite is designed to provide WiFi coverage for your home, office, hotel, or warehouse. Full roaming support ensures seamless transition of connected clients between individual APs. For network connectivity, the AP is equipped with a 2.5G ETH port, which also serves for… *The maximum transfer speed depends on regulatory requirements in the country of use Roaming - seamless transition between APs without dropouts Wireless uplink â ideal for locations where a data cable cannot be installed Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balancing - maintaining even load distribution / client switching Speed limiting for each SSID Device Ceiling mount kit Screw set
